role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective primarily through managed exposure to ether futures contracts. In this manner, the fund seeks to provide investment results that correspond to the performance of ether. It is non-diversified.
